seed_data_creation: Used existing heatmap data (624 grid cells, 16 high risk, 133 moderate)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Heatmap drill-down feature fully implemented. Backend: GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/cell/{grid_id} returns detailed cell info with 8 signals (forecast, hotspot, trend, activity, patrol, environment, session_density, mobility_anomaly). Each signal has name/key/score/weight/weighted. Response includes composite_score, risk_level, lat/lng, dominant_signal, recommendations. Frontend: ZoneIntelPanel slides in from right (320px) when clicking heatmap zone. Shows all 8 signals with SignalBar components (colored progress bars). Close button (X) closes panel. Toggle button ON/OFF works. Legend shows zone counts. Heatmap zones are around Bangalore (12.9x, 77.5x), SOS markers around Mumbai (19.0x, 72.8x). Playwright click testing on Leaflet Circle elements is unreliable - use manual testing or mock the zone click state for full panel verification.
verified_features: Backend: GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/cell/{grid_id} returns 200 with full cell detail
Backend: Response includes composite_score (0-10), risk_level, lat, lng
Backend: Response includes signals array with all 8 AI signals
Backend: Each signal has name, key, score, weight, weighted fields
Backend: Response includes dominant_signal and recommendations
Backend: Invalid grid_id returns 404 'Cell not found'
Backend: RBAC - admin/operator can access, caregiver blocked (403)
Frontend: Legend shows zone counts when heatmap ON
Frontend: Legend hides when heatmap OFF
Frontend: Controls have transition style for panel animation
